idea-plugin.name: Threading Highlighter
idea-plugin.description:
Visualizes IntelliJ Platform threading contracts in your code.

Shows gutter icons where EDT/non-EDT assertions and slow operation checks occur at runtime. Helps developers understand and debug threading requirements in IntelliJ Platform plugins.

Requires: Running IDE with the Threading Highlighter Java agent.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0-SNAPSHOT

  • Initial release
  • Support for EDT, non-EDT, and slow operation markers
  • Automatic trace file watching with debouncing
  • Fast O(1) trace queries with indexed cache

action.description: Reload trace files from .ij-threading-highlighter directory and refresh gutter icons
Display diagnostic summary of loaded traces (for debugging)
